summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification shard. No GitHub mutations are planned because the job disables merge, fix, raise_pr, instant close, and low-signal closeout. Security-sensitive PRs are routed to central security handling; already-closed PRs are kept closed; remaining open non-security PRs are kept as related work needing normal PR follow-up rather than inventory cleanup.

actions.reason: Useful focused PR with proof, but not an inventory-close candidate and not merge-plannable under this job.
